items.title: Oracle Data Center Tax Abatement Approved at Full Valuation After Saline Board Reconsiders
items.dek: Trustees backtracked from a July 14 decision that would have limited the 50% break to $4.8 billion, now extending it to the project's full $43 billion projected value.
items.judge_note: A concrete reversal and new decision—the board voted to restore the full tax break after previously slashing it, a significant development beyond the earlier Ju
